summary: Iteration 76 - Frontend-only testing for landing page stats fix, text readability improvements, success stories shortening, and header/footer updates. All 10 test features verified successfully.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend changes verified. Landing page stats now show correct values (8,700+, ~40%, 98%, 1 in 80). No '0.012%' text found on any page. Success Stories page has 14 stories with shortened content. Appeal Statistics page shows '1 in 80' headline. Header and footer show 'Appeal Case Manager'. Mobile menu works with all navigation links. Report tier word counts unchanged (1,500-2,200 / 4,500-6,500 / 7,000-10,000).
